Daily agent loop

Wikiwiki V1 supports a CLI-first loop for status, spin, structured capture, revision, validation, rendering, and local search.

Home / Concepts
Concept cliv1agent-workflow

Summary

Wikiwiki V1 supports a CLI-first loop for status, spin, structured capture, revision, validation, rendering, and local search.

Details

The loop remains model-agnostic. Spin emits heuristic draft templates and command hints rather than AI-generated prose.

Related files

  • src/cli/commands/spin.ts
  • src/cli/commands/search.ts
  • src/cli/commands/symbol.ts
  • src/core/renderer.ts
